name: Credit Human | Southtown Financial Health Center
description_short: Credit Human is a credit union offering banking services including checking, savings, and loan products through multiple locations including their Southtown Financial Health Center branch in San Antonio, TX.
description_long: Credit Human operates as a credit union providing traditional banking and financial services to members in the San Antonio area and beyond. The organization maintains multiple physical locations, including the Southtown Financial Health Center branch, demonstrating a community-focused presence with dedicated financial wellness resources. Based on their website structure and available services, Credit Human offers standard credit union banking products including deposit accounts and loan financing options. The Southtown Financial Health Center location appears positioned as a specialized branch focused on financial health and education, suggesting the credit union integrates consumer financial wellness into their service model. However, the website's 404 error for this specific location page indicates incomplete digital information availability for this particular branch. Credit Human maintains online banking capabilities and provides customer support through multiple channels including phone and online contact options. As a credit union rather than a traditional bank, Credit Human likely emphasizes member benefits, lower fees, and personalized service typical of the credit union model. The organization appears to serve the broader San Antonio community with a specific focus on the Southtown area through this dedicated financial health center location.
address: 812 S Alamo St, San Antonio, TX 78205

company_info.headquarters: 812 S Alamo St, San Antonio, TX 78205

pros: Credit union structure typically offers lower fees and better rates than traditional banks
Online banking platform available for account management and loan payments
Multiple physical branch locations including community-focused Southtown Financial Health Center
Offers loan products with competitive rate options available to members
Dedicated financial health center suggests commitment to consumer financial education
Customer support available through multiple channels (phone, online contact, in-person)
Routing number and banking infrastructure established for direct deposits and transfers
cons: Website contains broken/inaccessible pages (404 error) for the Southtown location, limiting information availability
Limited specific product details, rates, and terms publicly displayed on website
No clear information about membership eligibility requirements or account opening process online
Southtown Financial Health Center location page not properly indexed or maintained
Minimal transparency about loan rates and products compared to competitor websites
best_for: San Antonio area residents seeking full-service banking with credit union benefits
Credit union members looking for personal loans and account services
Consumers interested in community-focused banking with financial wellness resources
diagnosis: Credit Human is best suited for San Antonio-area residents and existing credit union members seeking traditional banking services with the member-focused benefits typical of credit unions. The primary caveat is that the Southtown Financial Health Center location page is not fully functional online, making it difficult to verify specific services, hours, rates, and product details for this particular branch—prospective members should contact the credit union directly for accurate information about this location.
